summary: Comprehensive Orders & Subscriptions QA (Iteration 114) — Full end-to-end testing of A1-A5, B1-B4, C1-C2, D1-D2, E1-E2, F1-F5, G1-G4, H1-H3, I1-I2, SEC1-SEC3. 37 backend tests passed (5 failed due to rate-limiting/test issues), 5 skipped. Frontend UI tested: Admin Orders tab (filters, status change, View Notes, audit log, export CSV), Subscriptions tab, Customer portal. CRITICAL BUG found in checkout.py line 235.

critical.issue: CRITICAL BUG: checkout.py line 235 — `promo_code_data` is referenced inside the subscription bank-transfer branch before it is assigned. `promo_code_data = None` only occurs at line 264 in the one-time branch, AFTER the subscription branch exits. This causes `NameError: name 'promo_code_data' is not defined` for any GoCardless subscription checkout. Currently unreachable because only `automate-accounts` tenant has GoCardless connected but customers cannot login there. Would immediately break if any partner tenant connects GoCardless.
critical.fix: Initialize `promo_code_data = None` before the `if checkout_type == 'subscription':` block (around line 131), or move the initialization to the top of the function.

minor.issue: Returns 429 rate-limited during rapid test sequences. Not a real bug — test mitigation: add delay between calls.

Account locked with 7+ failed login attempts from previous test runs. PUT /api/admin/users/{id} does not support password reset (no `password` field in allowed update fields). No admin reset-password endpoint available. Tenant A admin is effectively locked — cross-tenant isolation tests for tenant A admin role skipped.

ui_bugs.issue: Fee column ALWAYS renders an amber badge with 'fee: —' text even for orders with $0.00 fee (e.g., scope_pending orders). This looks confusing. Line 343-347: `fee: {order.fee > 0 ? ... : '—'}`. Should either hide the badge for zero-fee orders or display '$0.00'.

integration_issues.flow: Admin Orders Logs button (order-specific audit trail)
integration_issues.issue: When clicking 'Logs' button for a specific order in the Orders table, the sidebar 'Logs' navigation link gets activated instead of opening the order-specific audit trail modal. The order-specific logs functionality (setLogsUrl + setShowAuditLogs) could not be independently verified. The full audit trail page (Logs tab) shows correctly with 686 events.

issues: Fee column amber badge 'fee: —' shown for all orders regardless of fee amount — misleading for zero-fee scope_pending orders

Cart.tsx line 132 uses `ws.stripe_fee_rate || 0.029` fallback (2.9%) which doesn't match SERVICE_FEE_RATE=0.05 (5%). In practice website settings return 0.05 correctly. But if website settings fail or are missing, Cart would show wrong fee percentage.

wrong_url_in_test: test_export_orders_csv — used /api/admin/orders/export instead of /api/admin/export/orders (correct URL is /api/admin/export/orders, frontend uses correct URL)
test_customer_wrong_currency: test_checkout_not_yet_requires_override_code — test customer has AUD currency, checkout rejects AUD before reaching partner tag validation. Backend behavior is CORRECT, test needs USD/CAD customer.

skipped_reasons: test_create_manual_order — no suitable customer in default tenant
test_admin_create_manual_subscription — tenant A admin locked out

frontend_tests.admin_orders_tab: PASS — filters (status, date, search, payment method), Clear button, Export CSV (via /api/admin/export/orders), View Notes (notes_json displayed fully), Status change, Audit trail accessible
frontend_tests.admin_subscriptions_tab: PARTIAL — list loads, offline_manual enum confirmed, cancel/create manual sub skipped (tenant A admin locked)
frontend_tests.customer_portal: PASS via API — orders visible with required fields, no sensitive fields exposed, IDOR protected
frontend_tests.checkout_flow: PARTIAL — AUD customer cannot checkout (by design), card/bank payment disabled for test customers (by design), terms/partner tag validations confirmed

security_tests.SEC1_price_tampering: PASS — checkout returns 400/403 for customers without card payment enabled; server computes price server-side ignoring client overrides
security_tests.SEC2_cross_tenant_admin: PASS — tenant A orders list ONLY returns tenant A orders, tenant B orders list ONLY returns tenant B orders
security_tests.SEC3_cross_tenant_customer: PASS — customer cannot access orders from other tenants (404 returned)
security_tests.IDOR_customer_orders: PASS — customer cannot access other customers' orders
security_tests.audit_logs_no_secrets: PASS — audit trail contains no API keys, JWT secrets, or password hashes
security_tests.notes_json_no_sensitive_data: PASS — customer portal order notes_json contains only customer-submitted data

invariants_status.tenant_isolation: PASS — get_tenant_filter enforces isolation at both admin and customer layers
invariants_status.payment_authority_server_side: PASS — price computed server-side using SERVICE_FEE_RATE=0.05, client cannot override
invariants_status.5_percent_fee: PASS — SERVICE_FEE_RATE=0.05 confirmed, fee = round_cents(subtotal * 0.05) for card payments
invariants_status.gocardless_not_immediate_paid: PASS — GoCardless creates pending_direct_debit_setup status, not paid
invariants_status.notes_json_merge_not_replace: PASS — _deep_merge used for scope_request_form; build_checkout_notes_json creates fresh notes per checkout session
invariants_status.offline_manual_enum: PASS — 'offline_manual' is valid status, 'manual' alone is NOT a valid status

confirmed_bugs.description: NameError: promo_code_data used before assignment in bank-transfer subscription checkout
confirmed_bugs.reproduction: 1. Connect GoCardless for any partner tenant. 2. Customer with bank_transfer enabled attempts subscription checkout via POST /api/checkout/bank-transfer with checkout_type=subscription. 3. Server crashes with NameError at line 235.
confirmed_bugs.impact: All subscription GoCardless checkouts fail with 500. Currently only automate-accounts tenant has GC but customers can't log in there.
confirmed_bugs.fix: Add `promo_code_data = None` before line 133 (if checkout_type == 'subscription':) in checkout_bank_transfer function.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix promo_code_data NameError in checkout.py line 235 — add `promo_code_data = None` before the subscription branch at line 133
MEDIUM: Add admin user password reset endpoint (POST /api/admin/users/{id}/reset-password) to allow password management for locked accounts
LOW: Fix fee column display — hide amber badge or show $0.00 for orders with zero fee
LOW: Cart.tsx line 132 fallback fee rate 0.029 → should be 0.05 to match backend SERVICE_FEE_RATE
INFO: CSV export correct URL is /api/admin/export/orders (frontend uses correct URL, only test had wrong path)
critical_code_review_comments: checkout.py line 235: promo_code_data NameError — subscription bank transfer path uses variable before it is initialized (line 264). Fix: move `promo_code_data = None` to top of function or before subscription branch.

checkout.py: Currency check at line 428 happens BEFORE partner tag validation at line 438. This means AUD/non-USD-CAD customers get 'Purchases not supported' before reaching partner tag gate. This blocks testing partner tag behavior for non-USD/CAD customers but is logically correct (don't charge unsupported currencies).

backend/routes/admin/users.py: PUT /api/admin/users/{id} does not support password reset (intentional security measure). But there's no separate admin-reset-password endpoint, making it impossible to unlock accounts that get locked by failed login attempts.
OrdersTab.tsx line 343-347: fee amber badge always renders, showing 'fee: —' for zero-fee orders. Should conditionally render only when fee > 0.
Cart.tsx line 132: fallback fee rate 0.029 (2.9%) does not match backend SERVICE_FEE_RATE=0.05 (5%). Should use 0.05 as fallback.

success_rate.frontend: 75% (core flows work, minor display issue and one Logs modal interaction unverifiable)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing test users: test_enq_iter16@test.local (tenant A customer, AUD currency). Tenant A admin test.super.a@iter109.test has 7 failed logins.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tenant A admin (test.super.a@iter109.test) is locked with 7+ failed login attempts. Need to reset via DB or create new tenant admin. Test customer test_enq_iter16@test.local has AUD currency so cannot do card/bank checkout (by design). For checkout testing, need a USD or CAD customer with either allow_card_payment=True or allow_bank_transfer=True in a tenant that has Stripe/GoCardless connected. Currently only automate-accounts tenant has payment connections but customers cannot login there. The critical bug (checkout.py line 235) is in subscription bank-transfer path which requires GoCardless to be enabled for an accessible tenant.

BUG-1_promo_code_data_nameerror.root_cause: checkout_bank_transfer function in checkout.py splits into subscription and one-time branches at line 133. The subscription branch (lines 133-260) references promo_code_data at line 235 in the notes_json dict. However, promo_code_data is first assigned at line 264 which is in the one-time section, AFTER the subscription branch returns. Python's variable scoping means this reference to an unbound variable causes NameError at runtime.
reproduction_steps: 1. Connect GoCardless for any partner tenant (via oauth_connections)
2. Login as a customer with allow_bank_transfer=True and GoCardless-enabled tenant
4. Server reaches line 208 (await db.subscriptions.insert_one) and evaluates the dict
5. At line 235, promo_code_data is referenced but not yet defined
6. Python raises NameError: name 'promo_code_data' is not defined
7. FastAPI catches and returns 500 Internal Server Error
BUG-1_promo_code_data_nameerror.mitigation: Add `promo_code_data = None` at line 130 (before the subscription/one-time branch). The subscription branch does not support promo codes currently, so initializing to None is correct.
